name: Geno Bisconte
blurb: Known for an insult-driven club style, he has written for the Comedy Central Roasts of Charlie Sheen and Rob Lowe and appeared on Gotham Comedy Live and Crashing.
bio: Geno Bisconte is an American stand-up comedian, writer, and radio host raised in Vineland, New Jersey, and based in New York City. Known for an insult-driven club style, he has written for the Comedy Central Roasts of Charlie Sheen and Rob Lowe and appeared on Gotham Comedy Live and Crashing. He has hosted radio and podcast shows alongside Artie Lange and Anthony Cumia, including In Hot Water on Compound Media.

timeline.ev: Made New York City his home base as a stand-up comedian

flags.bits_honest_gap_note: Only ONE official embeddable stand-up clip found on YouTube: his Gotham Comedy Live (2013) set, posted to his own official channel (@GenoBisconte) and matching the logged appearance. His online presence is overwhelmingly podcast/interview content (Compound Media, SimpCast, 'It's Comedy People,' 'In Hot Water'). Other stand-up results were fan/third-party uploads (e.g. 'Jenkum #1' on Josh Denny's channel, 'Carolines part 1' on a random account) and were rejected. A 'Geno Live at Gotham' set exists only on his official Facebook, not YouTube. Below the 3-clip minimum. Instagram verified (200); website genobisconte.com did not resolve (curl 000).
